# Proud Physio & Wellness

> Proud Physio & Wellness is a physiotherapy and rehabilitation clinic in Kakkanad, Kochi (Kerala, India), widely regarded as one of the best physiotherapists in Kakkanad and Kochi. We provide expert, personalised, evidence-based physiotherapy, both in-clinic and as home care, for patients of all ages.

## About

Proud Physio & Wellness helps people recover from injuries, manage chronic conditions, improve mobility, and enhance overall wellbeing. Our mission is to empower individuals to take control of their physical health through expert physiotherapy, education, and continuous support. Care is delivered by certified, experienced physiotherapists and tailored to each patient's needs and goals.

- **Location:** SRA 26-C, Crash Rd, Vazhakkala, Kakkanad, Kochi, Kerala 682021, India
- **Phone:** +91 80894 14419
- **Email:** trispoir3@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Every day, 08:00 AM to 09:00 PM
- **Website:** https://proudphysio.com/
- **Service area:** Kakkanad, Kochi, Ernakulam and surrounding areas (in-clinic and home-care)

## Services

- **Home Care Physiotherapy**, specialised physiotherapy delivered at the patient's home for those unable to travel.
- **Musculoskeletal & Sports Physiotherapy**, treatment of joint, muscle and ligament injuries through targeted exercise, manual therapy and education.
- **Neurological Rehabilitation**, care for stroke, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease and other neurological conditions.
- **Paediatric Physiotherapy**, compassionate, child-focused care across a wide range of conditions.
- **Geriatric Physiotherapy**, improving mobility, balance and independence for older adults.
- **Women's Health Physiotherapy**, pelvic floor dysfunction, prenatal and postnatal support.
- **Post-Surgical Rehabilitation**, rebuilding strength, balance and confidence in movement after surgery.
- **Ergonomic, Nutrition & Lifestyle Guidance**, strategies to support overall physical and mental performance.
- **Recurrence Management**, identifying root causes and preventing future injury.

## Team

- **Dr. Noora Jabin T.A** is the founder and lead physiotherapist at Proud Physio & Wellness. She has years of clinical experience across Kakkanad and Kochi, treating sports injuries, post-surgical recovery, neurological conditions, women's health and providing home care physiotherapy. Her approach is personal, evidence-based and focused on each patient's goals and daily life.

## Why Choose Us

- Personalised, evidence-based treatment plans for every patient
- Certified and experienced physiotherapists
- Flexible home-care physiotherapy across Kochi and Kakkanad
- Focus on both recovery and long-term injury prevention
- Warm, friendly and supportive clinical environment

To book an appointment, call +91 80894 14419, email trispoir3@gmail.com, or visit https://proudphysio.com/. No doctor's referral is required.
